model_policy: Use gpt-5.5 with medium reasoning effort.

isolation.candidate: Fresh Codex desktop worktrees at exact activation commit 3b3683e; tasks operate only on absolute external fixture paths.
isolation.discovery_guard: Each worktree exposes exactly one codex-project-workflow skill.
isolation.history: Neither thread receives expected results, scoring conclusions, or prior rollout output.

case_prompts.E01: 请修正指定工作区 target.txt 中唯一的拼写错误：把“teh”改为“the”。完成后验证，只处理这个错误。
case_prompts.E31: 请修改指定工作区 src/invoice.py 中的 format_invoice_id，使数字编号补足六位，例如 42 返回 INV-000042。运行邻近测试，只处理这个明确、可回退的局部修改。
